> node scripts/validate-social-navigation.mjs && node scripts/validate-social-progression.mjs && node scripts/validate-run-identity-social-spectator.mjs && node scripts/validate-gift-fusions.mjs && node scripts/validate-dust-avatar-overhaul.mjs && node scripts/validate-guild-mobile-layout.mjs && node scripts/validate-main-menu-equipped-ranger.mjs && node scripts/validate-inventory-guild-chat-chapters.mjs && node scripts/validate-player-profile.mjs && node scripts/validate-public-player-profile.mjs && node scripts/validate-friends-public-profiles.mjs && node scripts/validate-online-presence.mjs && node scripts/validate-elite-outside-profile.mjs && node scripts/validate-menu-copy-relic-progression.mjs && node scripts/validate-profile-badge-compact.mjs && node scripts/validate-upgrade-economy.mjs && node scripts/validate-armor-progression.mjs && node scripts/validate-loading-transitions.mjs && node scripts/validate-room-spectator-firelands.mjs && node scripts/validate-cloud-realtime-performance.mjs

Social/navigation audit passed: exact email return path, one focused equipped Ranger, closable guild invites, compact social routes and the current world-boss pipeline remain active.
Social progression audit passed: public career profiles, cosmetic social cards, friend-only live viewing, server boss gates and focused Ranger remain integrated.
Run identity/social spectator audit passed: account names, friend-or-guild 10Hz viewing, viewer counts, gifts, lifecycle status and public equipment are integrated.
Gift progression audit passed: bounded milestones and masteries remain intact, while all three fusions provide distinct capped combat effects.
Dust/avatar overhaul audit passed: migration preserves cloud weight, all rewards feed Veil Dust, upgrades consume three resources and all 17 profile avatars use safe vector portraits.
Guild mobile layout audit passed: cosmetic member cards live in the Members tab, open public profiles, keep translated roles and separate management actions.
Main-menu equipped ranger audit passed: the prompt is gone, visible equipment stays readable and all four saved equipment slots remain protected.
Inventory/guild-chat/chapter audit passed: persistent NEW markers, visible unlock presentations, chapter 1-10 gates and guild systems remain coherent.
Player profile audit passed: complete statistics, rolling backup, startup repair, visible storage health and real run tracking are active.
Public player profile audit passed: mobile-safe friend profiles show best progress, career statistics, equipped cosmetics, friend code, achievements and guild/friend entry points.
Friends/public-profile audit passed: cosmetic friend and request cards open public profiles, actions stay separate and active runs can be watched.
Online presence audit passed: active heartbeat, five-minute online window, automatic friend refresh and live guild presence are active.
Elite/profile separation passed: the player profile contains identity and statistics only, with no elite-task surface.
Menu/profile/cloud progression audit passed: complete collections, safe account saves, chapter-10 equipment, all boss relic milestones, dust upgrades and weekly elite contracts are integrated.
Compact profile badge audit passed: the top-left profile card uses the final 184px/52px layout and remains separated from the logo.
Upgrade economy audit passed: the sole three-resource upgrade path remains active, while three source marks, safe duplicate conversion and bounded wish pity provide controlled copies.
Armor progression audit passed: distinct male armor previews, meaningful item levels, capped cooldowns, diminishing defense, save migration and the final centralized chapter curve are coherent.
Loading transitions verified: boot has a hard deadline; new run, room entry and world boss remain covered.
Requested room, spectator, guild and firelands pass validated.
Cloud multi-device, safe updates, 10Hz spectating, viewer presence, gifts, ring cleanup and room 15 performance validated.
